_comment: Plugin-mode hook registration. Referenced by ../.claude-plugin/plugin.json. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to plugins/cm-harness/ when installed; the scripts themselves write to ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/_workspace/_memory/... via _schema.REPO_ROOT. dharness self-use uses .claude/settings.local.json with ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/plugins/cm-harness/hooks/... — do NOT install both at once for the same project (duplicate firings).
